[https://e.mk.virginvoyages.com/c2/1466:690a9b91eae4597a0809da74:ot:6891da094489de52ba02d2d7:1/0536cd55?jwtH=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9&jwtP=eyJpYXQiOjE3NjI4MDc3NzIsImNkIjoiLm1rLnZpcmdpbnZveWFnZXMuY29tIiwiY2UiOjg2NDAwLCJ0ayI6InZpcmdpbi12b3lhZ2VzIiwibXRsSUQiOiI2OTBjZTU4NTVmMDY3YzY5YmQwY2I4OWYiLCJsaW5rVXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudmlyZ2ludm95YWdlcy5jb20vYWhveS9zdG9yaWVzL25ldy1hbGFza2EtY3J1aXNlcy1iZXN0LXBvcnRzLXNob3JlLWV4Y3Vyc2lvbnM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1jb3JkaWFsJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXNhaWxvcnNjb29wMjAyNSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0xMTEwMjAyNV9zbC1zYWlsb3JzY29vcC1sZWFkcyZjSUQ9Njg5MWRhMDk0NDg5ZGU1MmJhMDJkMmQ3In0&jwtS=AAWyb1WstJxRkvxM-gRBGOSzitIWNvCB27kz7Y-bNYg]

Yes, you read that right. We’ll fly you by helicopter over the stunning Juneau
Icefield and land you directly on the Mendenhall Glacier. There, a team of
professional mushers and their very excited sled dogs are waiting to take you on
an exhilarating ride across the snow. It’s a bucket-list item you didn't even
know you had
